doc_title_en: Notice Regarding Surplus Dividend (Initial Dividend Payment)

key_facts.reason_jp: 経営基盤の強化及び財務安全性確保後、株主への利益還元を開始

summary_en: ¥39.00 per share dividend (¥17M total) for FY3/26, effective 2026-06-29. First dividend payment in company history. Sourced from retained earnings. Decision rationale: improved financial position and balance-sheet strength now permit shareholder distribution while maintaining internal reserves for future growth investment.
summary_jp: FY3/26期末配当 1株当たり39円（総額17百万円）、2026年6月29日効力発生。初配当。利益剰余金を原資。経営基盤強化後、株主還元開始の判断。
tag_jp: 配当 - 初配 - 1株当たり39円 - 総額17百万円 - FY3/26
